title: Mama, Don't Go
overview: Nine-year-old Marco is thrilled to go on a family picnic, not knowing that it will be the last one before his mother Anna leaves Italy to work abroad.

title: Marco, a Boy from Genoa
overview: A year has passed since Anna left. Marco thinks about becoming a postman after receiving a letter from her on the day his older brother visits home.

title: Sunday at the Harbor
overview: Marco sets out on his first job to deliver an urgent letter for Gina. A fun day at the beach begins when he finally returns in the afternoon.

title: I Hate You, Papa
overview: Marco wants to work to help his mother come home sooner, but his father won't listen.

title: My Good Friend, Emilio
overview: Emilio helps Marco get a job washing bottles after school. Marco's father Pietro buys him a world map and the two bond for the first time in a while.

title: Marco's Payday
overview: Marco has an ominous dream about his mother, and he worries when there is no new letter from her.

title: Watching the Ocean from the Roof
overview: Poor Marco can barely see the ocean from his new place. He goes from roof to roof to find a better view and meets Fiorina the puppeteer along the way.

title: The Peppino Puppet Troupe
overview: Marco's monkey delights onlookers by dancing in the puppet show. Peppino the puppet master invites Marco to dinner to show his gratitude.

title: I'm Sorry, Papa
overview: When Marco shows Pietro's friend the way to the hospital, he is touched to discover his father testing a new treatment on himself to save a patient.

title: Mama Is in Buenos Aires
overview: Concetta goes out on the streets despite having a cold. Her symptoms worsen, but the family can't afford a doctor. Marco goes to the clinic for help.

title: A Letter from Mama
overview: Fiorina must put on a show alone because everyone else is ill. Just as she gets safely through it with Marco's help, bad news arrives about Anna.

title: The Airship
overview: Marco once again considers going to Argentina. Emilio asks Renato to help Marco get to Argentina after having huge success with his ice cream sales.

title: Goodbye, Fiorina
overview: Joy over the group trip to Argentina is cut short when Renato goes back on his word. Marco gives Amedeo a letter for Anna and entrusts him to Peppino.

title: Marco's Decision
overview: When Marco reveals that he'd meant to be on the ship to Argentina, Pietro begins laying the groundwork to go himself.

title: The Forgole
overview: Marco is discovered by Leonardo, but the ship's head cook is impressed by his persistence. Pietro learns the extent of his son's determination.

title: The Young Cook
overview: The head cook is touched by Marco's love for his mother and takes him under his wing.

title: Neptune's Revel
overview: Marco grows fond of his new life aboard the ship.

title: The Immigrant Ship to Rio
overview: The ship arrives in Rio de Janeiro. Marco's friends help him look for another ship headed to Buenos Aires.

title: The Shining Stars of the Southern Cross
overview: The ship Marco boards in Rio is full of sick people and the meals are dismal. Marco meets a lost little boy named Nino aboard the crowded ship.

title: The Stormy Night
overview: Six days after leaving Rio, the ship sustains heavy damage due to violent weather.

title: Rio de La Plata
overview: Marco begs for the ship to go faster after waking from a terrifying nightmare.

title: The Town Where Mother Is
overview: The ship finally arrives in Buenos Aires. The person who knows Anna's whereabouts has run away, and Marco loses all his money to a pickpocket.

title: Another Mother
overview: Marco is at his wit's after losing all his money. Then he hears about a woman named Anna who has been taken to the hospital, and rushes to see her.

title: Fiorina Is Waiting
overview: After being left with absolutely no information on his mother's whereabouts, Marco hears a rumor about a familiar puppet show in the area.

title: The Peppino Troupe Makes a Big Hit
overview: Peppino and his family decide to accompany Marco to Bahía Blanca.

title: To the Pampas
overview: The day has come to leave for Bahía Blanca.

title: Fiorina's Tears
overview: Peppino has an idea to start a show based on Marco's life. Fiorina breaks down and cries for the real Marco during practice for her role as Marco.

title: The Barbossa Ranch
overview: Fiorina's heart breaks further as Peppino decides to write the death of Marco's mother into the puppet play to elicit more emotion.

title: Snow Falls
overview: Marco and his friends finally find shelter after running out of water. Gaucho Carlos revitalizes the group with hot food and wonderful music.

title: Old Gaucho Carlos
overview: Marco and his friends are able to make their way to an inn after Carlos repairs their carriage.

title: A Long Night
overview: Peppino and his troop stay the night in an abandoned place with a caved-in roof. Marco and Peppino decide to keep quiet about a harrowing encounter.

title: Saying Goodbye
overview: An Italian immigrant family suggests paying Mr. Moretti a visit for possible information on Marco's mother.

title: Mama Is Not Here
overview: Marco visits Mr. Moretti soon after arriving in Bahía Blanca, but he provides no information on his mother or uncle's whereabouts.

title: I Want to Go Back to Genoa
overview: Peppino's words have no effect on Marco. When Fiorina expresses her concern, Marco breaks down crying that his mother is probably already dead.

title: Mama's Handwriting
overview: Marco meets a vagrant in town. After hearing his story, the man gives Marco a letter from his mother as well as new information on her whereabouts.

title: Farewell, Bahia Blanca
overview: The news of his mother brings Marco's time with Fiorina closer toward its end. Marco starts working at a coal mine to cover his travel expenses.

title: Endless Journey
overview: Marco arrives in Buenos Aires, only to discover that his mother had already moved on to Córdoba.

title: Mama's Hardship
overview: Marco learns the deep extent of his mother's patience when he meets her cruel former employer before setting out to sail once again.

title: Rosy Dawn in Rosario
overview: The captain becomes angry about Marco getting a free ride to Rosario, but changes his attitude upon discovering that Marco is a fellow Genoese.

title: The Star of Italy
overview: Marco gets turned away at the door at the mansion in Rosario. Federico scrounges up enough money to cover Marco's train fare to Córdoba.

title: If I Could Go Home with Mother...
overview: Marco strengthens his resolve to find his mother after his chance meeting with a woman and her children during the train ride to Córdoba.

title: A New Friend, Pablo
overview: Mequinez had moved long before Marco's arrival in Córdoba. In the town, Marco meets a boy named Pablo and develops a strange relationship with him.

title: Somewhere in This Town
overview: To raise some money, Pablo looks for work in the fields. Unfortunately, the period is the wrong one and so he tries his luck fishing.

title: Helping Fuana
overview: The house is not inhabited by the person Marco is looking for, but by an architect. The man, who appreciates the efforts of the little traveler, also offers him the money to travel to Tucuman.

title: Going North
overview: The train attendants find Marco during an inspection and the boy ends up going down thirty kilometers from the destination.

title: The Trip on the Oxcart
overview: During the journey, Marco falls ill for a few days and the herdsmen who take him with them must take care of his recovery.

title: Mama Lives at the Foot of the Mountain
overview: After traveling for days, Marco leaves the group of herdsmen to get to Tucuman.

title: Don't Die, My Burro
overview: The journey to the village of Tucuman proves to be more hard than expected.

title: Mama Is Calling Me
overview: Having lost his donkey, Marco has to walk on foot.

title: Run, Marco, Run!
overview: Exhausted and under the snow, Marco is collected by a young man on horseback. On the way, a local elder has his nephew take him to Tucuman.

title: Mama's Smile
overview: The long journey is over. The residence of the Mequinez is now visible and Marco reaches his mother.

title: Back to Genoa with Mama
overview: After the recovery, Marco's mother can resume normal life. The Mequinez family, out of gratitude, gives the ticket to Genoa to both of them, with the promise of returning to Argentina.
